creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #5)
Torsten, once merged we set merge-quarterly+.  We would set merge-quarterly- for a denied merge.  The submitter would usually set merge-quarterly? if they wanted to request the commit be MFH'd and the committer would be expected to handle that positively or negatively.

Tag with 'security' keywords and set 'in progress' for you pending the VuXML to finish the job.
